name: Red Lion Inn Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease 2 loaf pans, 24 muffin cups, or 6 mini loaf pans.
2. Combine eggs, sugar, oil, and pumpkin in a large bowl. Stir until smooth.
3. Sift together dry ingredients and spices. Add to egg mixture along with walnuts and raisins. Mix thoroughly and fill pans.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar over loaves.
5. Bake large loaves for 1 hour, 10 minutes; muffins for 35-40 minutes; mini loaves for 45 minutes. A toothpick inserted into the center should come out clean.
